vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: While I value comfort, I cannot deny that the aesthetic appeal of a sleek pair of leather boots often influences my purchase.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (tối ưu cho sự thoải mái/sức khỏe)
vocab.example: I tend to gravitate towards footwear with an ergonomic design to ensure my feet don't ache after a long day of walking.

vocab.meaning: hy sinh sự tiện dụng để chạy theo thời trang
vocab.example: I've never been one for sacrificing utility for fashion; if a shoe pinches my toes, it's a hard pass for me.

vocab.meaning: những lựa chọn về cách ăn mặc/thời trang
vocab.example: My sartorial choices usually lean towards minimalism, so I look for shoes that are both understated and comfortable.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ chỉnh hình (tốt cho xương khớp bàn chân)
vocab.example: High-end running shoes offer excellent orthopedic support, which is paramount for someone with a high arch like mine.
Ideally, I try to strike a balance between a trendy silhouette and a cushioned sole.

vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, đón đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: Some fashion-forward sneakers managed to look incredibly avant-garde without compromising on wearer comfort.
I prioritize versatility, opting for shoes that look good enough for a meeting but are comfy enough for a commute.
During the summer, shoes made from breathable fabric are much more desirable than heavy, polished dress shoes.

vocab.meaning: khả năng chịu đựng/độ bền bỉ (khi đi lại nhiều)
vocab.example: When traveling, the endurance of my footwear is key, so I always pick functionality over mere visual flair.
